entry.title: New: BILL046(24) (Honolulu) — Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Establishes an empty homes tax as a supplemental real property tax on dwelling units that are vacant for a certain number of days each year and provides exemptions from the empty homes tax. Requires residential property owners to annually submit a property status declaration. Provides the Department of Budget and Fiscal Services with rulemaking authority. Establishes violations and penalties, including foreclosure of real properties having delinquent empty homes taxes and penalties for at least three consecutive years after notice.

Latest action: Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.

View on the council site
